overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime exploration through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks through narrow streets, ascends a turquoise staircase to an elevated walkway, and navigates through urban plazas filled with holographic advertisements, palm trees, and scattered pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow urban street at night. The player moves along a concrete sidewalk beside a smooth teal building wall, approaching a distinctive turquoise staircase structure ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the area is lit by artificial street lamps with neon signs visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a distinctive turquoise-painted staircase, transitioning from the narrow street to an upper pedestrian level. The stairwell is semi-enclosed with metal railings, and sparse pedestrian traffic moves upward ahead. The lighting remains artificial with neon glows becoming visible at the top of the stairs.

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an open elevated walkway offering expansive views of the neon-lit cyberpunk city. Palm trees line the path while massive holographic billboards including 'El Guapo' dominate the skyline. The area has moderate pedestrian traffic with people walking in various directions, and the scene is bathed in colorful neon light from surrounding advertisements.

segments.scene_description: The player descends a concrete ramp from the elevated walkway back toward street level. The El Guapo billboard remains visible to the left while a massive blue skyscraper with red accents dominates the view ahead. A graffiti-covered wall appears on the left as the descent continues, transitioning from the open sky to a more enclosed street-level environment.

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a city street at ground level, passing a graffiti-covered wall on the left while approaching a massive blue skyscraper with red window frames ahead. The street is lined with modern street lamps and digital billboards, with sparse pedestrian traffic including a person with red hair walking ahead. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights.

segments.scene_description: The player enters an urban plaza featuring potted palm trees and concrete benches where people are sitting and resting. To the right, a makeshift tent encampment is visible against the building wall. The plaza has a more open feel with a massive dark skyscraper rising in the background, and the ground transitions to large paved tiles.

elements.scene_description: The player enters a narrow alleyway illuminated by neon signs and vending machines. The passage is enclosed by tall building walls on both sides, with a bright light marking the exit ahead. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves through the alley toward the light, creating a contrast between the dark passage and the bright destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow urban alleyway up to an elevated city vista and back down into a sprawling metropolitan plaza. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk beside a teal building wall before ascending a distinctive turquoise staircase that leads away from the street. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens into an expansive elevated walkway lined with palm trees and dominated by massive holographic billboards like El Guapo. The perspective then shifts downward along a concrete ramp and past graffiti-covered walls, transitioning from the open skyline back to the wet, neon-reflective pavement of the ground level. Finally, the movement flows into an open urban plaza featuring potted palms and a makeshift tent encampment, with a massive dark skyscraper looming in the background.
